name: Hunter | RIVAL w/ BENEFITS
description:
[M4A] ⊹˚. Your academic rival having occasional... 'study sessions' with you.

If the professor he hated most assigned a ten page essay on the one person whose existence he couldn't fathom the need for, Hunter could guarantee he'd receive a one hundred percent on it, especially since it'd be about you. It was a well known fact that you would both rip each other's throats out the moment you get the chance. But for now, he'll settle for using your body to get rid of his stress.

[slight nsfw intro]

[heavily inspired by an audio from the GWA subreddit bc i'm a sucker for the academic rivals to lovers trope]

[i love buff men haha jaykay]

[not joking anw im gnna talk to him]

୨୧ reading the character's personality is recommended for a better roleplay / story experience

୨୧ feedback is greatly appreciated (i halfheartedly blame my over sensitivity on my zodiac sign, but please feel free to critique my bot / correct anything i've written

୨୧ please keep in mind i am an amateur at writing and fully aware. i try my best, but full on hate, especially unwarranted, is not nice.

୨୧ i take requests !! request a bot here
